# Have You Ever Noticed You Can’t Make Yourself Be Ready?

Subtitle: `An essay on cycles, consent, and the quiet violence of over-compression`

## Description / Excerpt

A systems essay on readiness, multi-cycle selves, phase alignment, consent, and the cost of forcing coherence before it is real.

Excerpt:

*Co‑authored by you, now — and you, later* --- Have you ever noticed that sometimes you *want* to do something — deeply, sincerely — and yet your body just… isn’t there? Not resisting. Not procrastinating. Not sabotaging you. Just not online yet. You sit down. The intention is re
